MINI MINUTES:
A P P E A R A N C E S:
Michael Mankes, Esq. and Sandro Garofalo, Esq. of LITTLER MENDELSON for defendants BRITISH MOTOR CAR DISTRIBUTORS, LTD. and DAVID MEESE moving for summary judgment/summary adjudication
Gary Cloutier, Esq. of WOTMAN & CLOUTIER 647-2200 for Plaintiff PAUL FALCIONE opposing party (Mr. Falcione also present in court)

ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED ON THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS FOLLOWS:
Re cause of action 1 - S U B M I T T E D.
Re cause of action 2 - TENTATIVE ADOPTED. Granted.
Re cause of action 3 - S U B M I T T E D.
Re cause of action 4 - TENTATIVE ADOPTED. Granted.
Re cause of action 5 - Treated as judgment on the pleadings and Granted except as to the extent that Plaintiff may be entitled to emotional distress damages based on other predicate acts.
Re cause of action 6 - TENTATIVE ADOPTED. Granted.
Re cause of action 7 - TENTATIVE ADOPTED. Granted.
(md) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
